Section.Title: Description
Section.Paragraph: The SetInitialData method supplies initial data to use when allocating the buffer this attribute is assigned to. Note that the supplied memory must remain valid and accessible until the AllocateMemory method is called.

Note.Paragraph: Initial data is consumed when memory is allocated. The source memory must remain valid and unmodified until allocation occurs.

Section.Title: Usage

ArgumentList.ArgumentListEntry: The source data to use when the attribute buffer is allocated.
The number of entries supplied in the source data.
The byte stride between consecutive source entries.

SubSection.Title: Return value
SubSection.ReturnValue: True if the operation succeeded, false otherwise. An assertion will be raised in debug builds if the result is not tested.
